baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Terramar Brands website. Used to construct product page URLs.

webImagesBaseUrl.title: Web Images Base URL
webImagesBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the image CDN. Used to construct product image and technical data sheet URLs.

apiBaseUrl.title: API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the Terramar Brands WCF API. Used to fetch department and product data.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of requests. Only ~10 API calls are needed for the full catalog.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Not required — the API is public with no rate limiting.
